# DavidEcomm
> Premium fixtures e-commerce for bathroom, doors & hardware, and kitchen & laundry.

## API
- OpenAPI: {SITE_URL}/api/v1/openapi.json
- Products: {SITE_URL}/api/v1/products
- Product feed: {SITE_URL}/api/feeds/products.json
- Categories: {SITE_URL}/api/v1/categories
- Search: {SITE_URL}/api/v1/search?q=vanity

## Notes
- Prices are represented in Australian cents.
- Phase 1 storefront supports mock catalog data when Supabase environment variables are not configured.
